props.text: Intent goes in. Interface comes out.
Agents commit to meaning — nodes, bindings, motifs. ViewSpec compiles the UI, the state reducer, replay checks, and shell proof. Deterministic, and no runtime LLM.
CompositionIR to UI and reducer, no LLM.
Provenance, replay, and shell hash attached.
Eight compiled projections from one semantic graph.
Source-bound previews and applied receipts keep changes traceable.
html-tailwind and React locally; four integrity-checked targets through the paid API.
viewspec validate-intent fails closed on drift.
viewspec prove --intent compiles, checks, and renders the exact artifact.
Local SDK. Unlimited compiles, proofs, and surfaces.
149/mo. Hosted compiler API, 10k calls per day.
Custom volume, organization sharing, and support.
Every element traces to its address.
Same source, design, and compiler version; same bytes and hash.
